What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

SPECIALIZING IN THE CARE OF SMALL BREED DOGS, Proof of Rabies, Bordetella, and Distemper vaccinations are required to board. All dogs over the age of 6 months must be spayed or neutered. Reservations are required., Describe your dog's socialization history with other dogs, With every stay, you will receive a daily photo update to let you know how your dog is doing.

Today ops snapshot Reservation board Biscuit Y. Record Reservation + Vaccine View Stay Timing + High-Demand Window Pickup Recap + Repeat-Booking View Setup Map

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • Every new small-breed pup tracked from contact-form intake (name/breed/age, spayed-or-neutered, socialization history) to confirmed reservation in one record
  • Rabies / Bordetella / Distemper proof + spay-or-neuter-over-6-months status visible per pup, with expiration flags
  • One rate lookup per pup across Boarding ($45/day), Full Day Daycare ($45), Half Day Daycare ($25), Dog Walking, Day Visits, Pet Taxi, Baths + Brush Outs - with the 6pm late-fee cutoff attached

1. Today ops snapshot

Today ops snapshot

Who is on the property, who is arriving for daycare or boarding, and who is waiting on a contact-form reply or a missing Rabies/Bordetella/Distemper record - one glance instead of a full inbox, with the 6pm late-fee cutoff called out.

2. Reservation board

Reservation board

Every small-breed pup moves through Contact form received -> Vaccines on file -> Meet-and-greet scheduled -> Booked -> Checked-in -> Pickup recap, matching the 'CLICK HERE TO GET STARTED AT TINY TAILS' flow Abra runs today.

Open this view

3. Biscuit Y. Record

Biscuit Y. Record

One page per pup with owner contact, vaccines (Rabies / Bordetella / Distemper) with expirations, spay/neuter status (over-6-months policy), socialization history from the contact form, feeding, meds, meet-and-greet notes, and booking history across Boarding / Daycare / Dog Walking / Pet Taxi / Baths.

Open this view

4. Reservation + Vaccine View

Reservation + Vaccine View

Per-booking view: dates, drop-off/pick-up windows with the 6pm late-fee cutoff, correct rate across all seven service lines ($45 boarding, $45/$25 full/half daycare, $20/$30/$40 day visits, $20/$40 pet taxi, $25+ bath, $10+ brush out, +$5 outside 10mi of 55406), plus Rabies/Bordetella/Distemper + spay/neuter on one row.

Open this view

5. Stay Timing + High-Demand Window

Stay Timing + High-Demand Window

Calendar of stays, contact-form leads, and meet-and-greet trial days - with high-demand Memorial Day / 4th of July / Thanksgiving / Christmas windows shaded so small-breed spots are pre-blocked for returning clients before the calendar fills.

Open this view

6. Pickup Recap + Repeat-Booking View

Pickup Recap + Repeat-Booking View

After the pre-6pm pickup: send the promised daily photo update per owner's preferred channel, gentle repeat-booking nudge, 60-day vaccine-expiration flag across Rabies / Bordetella / Distemper, and early-block the next high-demand window for returning clients.

Open this view

Setup Map
